title: limonium cornubiense
intro: Limonium cornubiense, also known as the Cornish heath, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Limonium cornubiense include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, have been used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues, skin conditions, and infections.
